overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The vehicle navigates urban streets, tunnels, and elevated highways with heavy rain effects and reflective wet surfaces. The scene features prominent red and blue neon lighting, futuristic architecture, and minimal traffic.

events.description: vehicle stops at red traffic light, waiting to proceed
accelerates through intersection, turning left onto main road
approaching highway entrance, leaving dense commercial area

agents.ego_description: navigating wet city streets, stopping at traffic signals and maneuvering through intersections

notable_agents.action: person in yellow raincoat standing at crosswalk waiting to cross

suspended traffic signal showing red light above intersection
tall street light with orange glow illuminating the rain
brutalist concrete building with weathered texture
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, navigating intersections with neon-lit buildings and sparse pedestrian activity. The vehicle stops at a red traffic light before accelerating through a left turn, with wet asphalt reflecting the orange street lamps and red neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway entrance ramp transitioning to covered roadway

events.description: enters covered highway underpass with concrete walls and ceiling
ambient light shifts to intense red neon tube lighting overhead
overtakes a slow-moving yellow vehicle on the right

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto highway ramp and entering tunnel-like structure, overtaking slower traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan driving slowly ahead, eventually passed on the right

entered.detail: large concrete archway marking the entrance to the covered highway section
orange and white striped concrete dividers separating lanes
concrete overpass ceiling with visible support beams
horizontal red neon tubes lining the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto a highway entrance ramp, leaving the open street for a semi-covered concrete tunnel structure. Red neon tube lights begin to dominate the ceiling as the environment becomes more enclosed, and the vehicle overtakes a slow yellow sedan while navigating between orange concrete barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with intense red neon lighting

events.description: immersed in deep red neon glow from overhead tube lights reflecting off wet road
approaching tunnel exit, natural darkness and city lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily through the red-lit tunnel section, maintaining speed

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with vertical panel textures lining the roadway
metal safety railing with reflective strips
tall dark building outline visible through tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: Driving through a fully enclosed highway tunnel bathed in intense red neon light from overhead tubes. The wet asphalt reflects the crimson glow while concrete walls and metal guardrails line both sides. The segment ends as the tunnel exit approaches, revealing the silhouettes of distant skyscrapers against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated open highway with distant skyscraper views

events.description: exits covered tunnel into open elevated highway with city skyline visible
slight right curve in the highway alignment

agents.ego_description: cruising on open highway, enjoying clear view of the city skyline ahead

entered.detail: massive illuminated skyscraper dominating the skyline ahead
tall concrete noise reduction walls with metal fencing on top
metal framework of overhead highway signs and lighting
faint glowing advertisement signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel onto an open elevated highway with expansive views of the cyberpunk city skyline. Tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows rise in the distance while concrete sound barriers line the sides. The red neon lighting gives way to cooler artificial street lighting as the vehicle follows a gentle right curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway ramp with colorful road markings

events.description: road surface changes to distinctive red and blue painted sections
navigating a sharp right curve on the highway ramp

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while navigating the curved ramp with colorful road markings

entered.detail: concrete safety barrier painted with red and white stripes following the curve
illuminated advertising screen showing animated content
distinctive red colored asphalt section marking the curve
blue illuminated section of roadway creating color contrast

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a curving highway ramp with distinctive red and blue painted road surfaces. The vehicle navigates a right turn passing large digital billboards and striped concrete barriers. The environment transitions from open highway to a more enclosed ramp structure with colorful neon-lit road markings guiding the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city that transitions from open neon streets into a claustrophobic, crimson-lit highway tunnel. It begins by navigating city intersections under orange street lamps and red neon signage, pausing briefly at a traffic light before accelerating through a left turn across wet, reflective asphalt. As the vehicle climbs an entrance ramp, the open urban environment shifts into a semi-covered concrete structure where red neon tubes begin to dominate the ceiling and the camera overtakes a yellow sedan. The scene then tightens into a fully enclosed tunnel bathed in intense crimson light, with the glow reflecting off the damp road and metal guardrails. Finally, the enclosed space opens up as the vehicle approaches the tunnel exit, revealing the dark silhouettes of distant skyscrapers against the night sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the exit of a dark tunnel onto an expansive elevated highway that eventually narrows into a neon-lit ramp. It begins by emerging into the open air, revealing a vast cyberpunk skyline of illuminated skyscrapers and concrete sound barriers as the red neon glow shifts toward cooler artificial street lighting. As the vehicle follows a gentle right curve, the open vista begins to tighten, transitioning the environment from a wide highway into a more enclosed structural corridor. The scene then shifts onto a curving ramp characterized by distinctive red and blue painted road surfaces and striped concrete barriers. Finally, the camera glides past large digital billboards, guided by colorful neon road markings that lead the way through the turn.
